description: Tracks inbound homeowner deck project leads from initial capture through job award. Separate from the Contractor Sales pipeline (which tracks contractor prospect outreach). Stage structure refined 2026-05-04 by Jim to match actual contractor process — bid lifecycle split into Creating → Delivered → Accepted (three distinct contractor activities, not one).
setup_notes: 1. HubSpot → Settings → Objects → Deals → Pipelines tab → Create pipeline
2. Name: 'Homeowner Leads'. Add the 9 stages below in order.
3. After save, click into each stage to grab stage IDs from URL; paste back here.
4. Settings → Properties → Deal properties → Create property — add the 10 custom deal properties listed in custom_deal_properties_needed.
5. Update this file with real pipeline_id and stage_ids.

stages.name: New Lead
stages.description: Lead received from Webflow form. Not yet scored or qualified.
stages.entry_trigger: Webflow form submit → HubSpot workflow creates deal here

stages.name: Qualified
stages.description: Lead passed scoring threshold (60+/100). Ready to route.

stages.name: Scheduled / Delivered to Contractor
stages.description: Lead routed to active contractor(s) via email + SMS. Contractor schedules site visit with homeowner.
stages.entry_trigger: Lead qualifies (score >= 60) and contractor notifications are sent

stages.name: Creating Bid
stages.description: Contractor has visited site / gathered specs and is actively writing the bid.
stages.note: Manual update by contractor (or Jim relaying contractor status). Trigger candidate: 48h reminder if still in this stage.

stages.name: Delivered Bid
stages.description: Contractor has sent written bid to homeowner. Awaiting homeowner decision.
stages.note: Manual update by contractor. Trigger candidate: 7-day follow-up reminder if no response.

stages.name: Accepted Bid
stages.description: Homeowner accepted contractor's bid. Revenue event — contractor owes $1,000 referral fee. Invoice trigger.
stages.note: Manual update by contractor; triggers invoice workflow.

stages.name: Won - Contractor Payment Received
stages.description: Referral fee collected ($1,000). Deal closed. Revenue recognized.
stages.note: Manual update by Jim once payment lands.

stages.name: Expired Bid - No Response
stages.description: Bid was delivered but homeowner went cold or said 'still deciding' beyond reasonable window. Not yet truly lost — re-engagement candidate.
stages.note: Holding stage for warm-revisit. NOT marked Closed Lost — still resurrectable. NOTE 2026-05-04: 50% win prob is Jim's initial estimate; revisit after first 10 leads land actual conversion data.

stages.name: Lost
stages.description: Bid was rejected or lead went cold permanently (no resurrection signal).

architecture_note_2026_05_05: HubSpot forms cannot populate Deal properties — only Contact, Company, and Ticket. Form-fillable lead detail therefore lives on Contact. A Workflow triggered on form submission creates a Deal in this pipeline at New Lead stage and associates it to the Contact. Deal properties below are only deal-lifecycle metadata managed by workflows or manual updates as the deal progresses through stages.

custom_contact_properties_needed.label: Lead Notes
custom_contact_properties_needed.description: Homeowner's additional project notes from the quote form

custom_contact_properties_needed.label: Owns Property
custom_contact_properties_needed.description: Whether homeowner owns the property where deck will be built (qualification field)

custom_contact_properties_needed.label: Source City
custom_contact_properties_needed.description: Auto-derived from form ZIP via workflow

custom_contact_properties_needed.label: UTM Source
custom_contact_properties_needed.description: Captured from URL utm_source on form submit (hidden field, populated by JS)

custom_contact_properties_needed.label: UTM Campaign
custom_contact_properties_needed.description: Captured from URL utm_campaign on form submit (hidden field, populated by JS)

custom_contact_properties_needed.label: GCLID
custom_contact_properties_needed.description: Google Click ID captured from URL on form submit; required for offline conversion sync

custom_contact_properties_needed.label: TCPA Consent Given
custom_contact_properties_needed.description: Homeowner consented to TCPA terms (SMS/phone contact)

custom_contact_properties_needed.label: Lead Source Page
custom_contact_properties_needed.description: Which page the form was submitted from (page_source value)

custom_deal_properties_needed.label: Lead Score
custom_deal_properties_needed.description: Qualification score (0-100) assigned by routing logic. Workflow-managed.

custom_deal_properties_needed.label: Disqualification Reason
custom_deal_properties_needed.description: Reason lead was disqualified. Workflow-managed; populated only on disqualified deals.

custom_deal_properties_needed.label: Matched Contractor
custom_deal_properties_needed.description: Which contractor the lead was routed to. Workflow-managed at routing.

custom_deal_properties_needed.label: Routing Sent At
custom_deal_properties_needed.description: Timestamp the lead was sent to contractor. Workflow-managed.

custom_deal_properties_needed.label: First Response Window Hours
custom_deal_properties_needed.description: Hours between routing and first contractor response (SLA tracking). Workflow-calculated.

custom_deal_properties_needed.label: Bid Amount
custom_deal_properties_needed.description: Contractor bid amount (manually entered when bid created).

custom_deal_properties_needed.label: Referral Fee Invoiced At
custom_deal_properties_needed.description: Timestamp invoice was sent for $1000 referral fee. Workflow-managed at Accepted Bid stage.

custom_deal_properties_needed.label: Referral Fee Paid At
custom_deal_properties_needed.description: Timestamp $1000 referral payment received. Manual update by Jim at Won stage.
